text.div: intentionally left empty / not meaningful

tr.td: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Human isophane insulin 70 unit/mL and recombinant human regular insulin 30 unit/mL solution for injection
Inject 10 units (70/30 insulin) subcutaneously once daily before breakfast
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
Metformin hydrochloride 500 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Alendronic acid (as alendronate sodium) 10 mg oral tablet
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms (1 spray) under the tongue as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Ferrous sulfate 325 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (325 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Assessment of health and social care needs
Referral to home health care service

ul.li: Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg as part of hypertension lifestyle management.
Reduce the number of apnea and hypopnea events per hour of sleep.
Improve subjective sleep quality as reported by the patient.
Maintain HbA1c within individualized target range to optimize glycemic control.
Achieve and maintain a healthy body weight as part of diabetes self-management plan.
Maintain blood pressure within individualized target range to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Maintain lipid levels within target range to reduce cardiovascular risk in diabetes.
Maintain fasting blood glucose within individualized target range.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Urea nitrogen [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Carbon dioxide, total [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma

Glucose [Presence] in Urine by Test strip

Protein [Presence] in Urine by Test strip

Leukocyte esterase [Presence] in Urine by Test strip

Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

Reduce the number of apnea and hypopnea events per hour of sleep.
